versions.version_description: Lady Gaga, Ariana Grande - Rain On Me https://youtu.be/ugQhauUEcJM. Capo 4th fret. Suggestions are welcome.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[tab]   [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]   or  [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
e|-2-------x-------x-------0-------0-------x-------|
B|-3-------0-------x-------2-------0-------0-------|
G|-4-------4-------4-------2-------0-------4-------|
D|-4-------0-------0-------2-------2-------4-------|
A|-2-------2-------x-------0-------2-------2-------|
E|-x-------3-------3-------x-------0-------3-------|[/tab]



[Verse 1]
Lady Gaga

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
I didn't ask for a free ride[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]
I only asked you to show me a real good time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
I never asked for the rainfall[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]A[/ch]
At least I showed up, you showed me nothing at all[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
Lady Gaga

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
            It's coming down on me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]
                  Water like misery[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
             It's coming down on me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
                  I'm ready, rain on me[/tab]

[Chorus]
Lady Gaga

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Bm[/ch]
I'd rather be dry, but at least I'm alive[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]
Rain on me, rain, rain  Rain on me, rain, rain[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Bm[/ch]
I'd rather be dry, but at least I'm alive[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
Rain on me, rain, rain  Rain on me[/tab]


[Post-Chorus]
Lady Gaga & Ariana Grande

[ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]    [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
  Rain on me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
  Mmm, oh yeah, baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
 Rain on me[/tab]


[Verse 2]
Ariana Grande

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Bm[/ch]
  Livin' in a world where no one's innocent[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Bm[/ch]
 Oh, but at least we try, mmm[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]
  Gotta live my truth, not keep it bottled in[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]
  So I don't lose my mind, baby, yeah[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
Ariana Grande & Lady Gaga

[tab]   [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
e|---2--------------------------------2---------------------0-------|
B|-3---2-3-5-------5--------5-------3---2-3-5-------5-------2-------|
G|-4-------0-------0--------0-------4-------0-------0-------2-------|
D|-4-------0-------0--------0-------4-------0-------0-------2-------|
A|-2--------------------------------2-----------------------0-------|
E|---------3-------3--------3---------------3-------3-------x-------|[/tab]


[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
I can feel it on my skin (It's comin' down on me)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]
Teardrops on my face (Water like misery)[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bm[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
Let it wash away my sins (It's coming down on me)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]
 Let it wash away, yeah[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Bm[/ch]
I'd rather be dry, but at least I'm alive[/tab]

I'd rather be dry, but at least I'm alive[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
Rain on me, rain, rain  Rain (Rain) on (On) me[/tab]

[ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]


[Post-Chorus]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
  Rain on me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
 Rain on me, ooh[/tab]


[Bridge]
Lady Gaga & Ariana Grande, Lady Gaga & Ariana Grande

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]

I'll be your galaxy

I'm about to fly

Rain on me, tsunami
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
  Hands up to the sky[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]
I'll be your galaxy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
 I'm about to fly[/tab]

Rain on me (Rain on me)[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Bm[/ch]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]
Rain on me, rain, rain  Rain on me, rain, rain (Rain on me)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Bm[/ch]
I'd rather be dry, but at least I'm alive (At least I'm alive)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Bm[/ch]
Rain on me, rain, rain (Rain on me, babe)  Rain on me (Rain on me)[/tab]

Lady Gaga & Ariana Grande, Lady Gaga & Ariana Grande
